chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. S- 415 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 4.7.2014 Mr. Sibgatullah advocate for petitioners Mr. M. Khan Lakho advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. Learned counsel submits that the petitioners are students of University of Sindh who have filed Direct Complaint before learned IInd Judicial Magistrate, Kotri agains some of the respondents which is pending on regular file. He submits that on account of that Direct Complaint the official respondents are causing harassment to the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Khan Lakho, for respondent Nos. 2 and 3, who are private respondents, has however, affirmed that in fact no harassment has been caused by the private respondents to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. present in court has submitted the comments of respondent No.1 which are taken on record. In the comments, the official respondent has denied to have caused any kind of harassment to the petitioner. It has further been pointed out in the comments that there are two cases bearing Crime Nos. 15 of 2014 and 23 of 2014 PS Jamshoro registered against the petitioners who in order to save their skin have filed the present petition. Be that as it may, since the official respondent has undertaken that he would not cause any harassment to the petitioner and the private respondents have categorically stated that they have not caused any harassment to the petitioner. The purpose of constitutional petition stands served. In view of the above, the present petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to provide legal protection to the petitioner and shall act strictly in accordance with law.

The purpose of constitutional petition stands served. In view of the above, the present petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to provide legal protection to the petitioner and shall act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE k/-
